description_long: This is a modern athletic running shoe featuring a predominantly white mesh upper with neon yellow accents, including three signature stripes on both sides. The shoe has a lightweight, breathable construction with visible mesh texture and synthetic overlays for added structure and durability. The lacing system is standard, with white laces threaded through reinforced eyelets. The midsole is thick and cushioned, designed for comfort and shock absorption, while the outsole appears to be made of durable rubber for traction. The heel and toe areas are reinforced, and the interior is padded for additional comfort. The overall design is sporty and functional, suitable for urban environments and active use.
description: A white athletic running shoe with neon yellow stripes, mesh upper, and cushioned sole, designed for comfort and performance.
description_view_0: Side view showing three neon yellow stripes, mesh texture, and the full profile of the shoe.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rounded toe, lacing system, and mesh upper.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with three neon yellow stripes and visible heel and toe reinforcement.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the padded heel collar and mesh back panel.
attribute_logo: Three parallel neon yellow stripes on both sides of the shoe
